category_sources: source_facts.description states Text-based personal organizer; official calcurse homepage describes a command-line calendar and scheduling application.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is calcurse; official homepage brands the project as calcurse.
docs_sources: Official calcurse support page lists pre-built documentation including HTML, PDF, manual page, and CalDAV docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; official calcurse development page gives the Git clone URL https://git.calcurse.org/calcurse.git/.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a personal organizer; official homepage describes events, appointments, tasks, curses UI, and command-line scripting.
